'''Trillan Katos''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who worked as a banker on a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. He and his family, a wife and two sons, were caught in the crossfire, but were rescued by his co-worker [[Rayt (civilian)|Rayt]] and his companions. Mistaking them for Republic [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], Katos fired upon them, barely missing.
